title: verific front end core dump with sub module memory reference
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

* unpack attached directory
* cd verific-memory-module-issue
* sby -f test.sby

## Expected behavior

should be able to refer to another module's registers with . operator

## Actual behavior

```
SBY 15:08:06 [test] Removing direcory 'test'.
SBY 15:08:06 [test] Copy 'test.v' to 'test/src/test.v'.
SBY 15:08:06 [test] Copy 'simple_mem.v' to 'test/src/simple_mem.v'.
SBY 15:08:06 [test] engine_0: smtbmc
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: starting process "cd test/src; yosys -ql ../model/design.log ../model/design.ys"
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: VERIFIC-WARNING [VERI-1927] test.v:13: port 'addr' remains unconnected for this instance
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: VERIFIC-WARNING [VDB-1002] simple_mem.v:10: net 'mem' does not have a driver
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: VERIFIC-WARNING [VDB-1002] test.v:16: net 'f_addr[7]' does not have a driver
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: VERIFIC-WARNING [VDB-1002] test.v:17: net 'f_data[7]' does not have a driver
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: VERIFIC-WARNING [VDB-1053] test.v:11: input port 'addr[7]' remains unconnected for this instance
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::out_of_range'
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: what():  dict::at()
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: bash: line 1: 19786 Aborted                 (core dumped) yosys -ql ../model/design.log ../model/design.ys
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: finished (returncode=134)
SBY 15:08:06 [test] base: job failed. ERROR.
SBY 15:08:06 [test] summary: Elapsed clock time [H:MM:SS (secs)]: 0:00:00 (0)
SBY 15:08:06 [test] summary: Elapsed process time [H:MM:SS (secs)]: 0:00:00 (0)
SBY 15:08:06 [test] DONE (ERROR, rc=16)
```


This goes away by un-commenting the flatten line in the .sby file

## tool versions

symbiotic-20191122A-symbiotic/
[verific-core-dump.tar.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/3968384/verific-core-dump.tar.gz)
